metrics.QueryText:
DEFINE VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
	TREATAS({"'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]"}, 'Parameter'[Parameter Fields])

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(__DS0FilterTable, "Total_Sales", IGNORE('Currency Selector'[Total Sales]))

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]"}, 'Parameter'[Parameter Fields])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %])),
			'Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %] = 15
		)

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		"Revenue_Leakage", IGNORE('Currency Selector'[Revenue Leakage])
	)

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]"}, 'Parameter'[Parameter Fields])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %])),
			'Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %] = 15
		)

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(__DS0FilterTable, __DS0FilterTable2, "Profit", IGNORE('Currency Selector'[Profit]))

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 =

EVALUATE

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]"}, 'Parameter'[Parameter Fields])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %])),
			'Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %] = 15
		)

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(

		"Return_Rate", IGNORE('Currency Selector'[Return Rate])

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]"}, 'Parameter'[Parameter Fields])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %])),
			'Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %] = 15
		)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[REGION],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			"Revenue_Leakage", 'Currency Selector'[Revenue Leakage]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(1001, __DS0Core, [Revenue_Leakage], 0, 'DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[REGION], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[Revenue_Leakage] DESC, 'DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[REGION]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]"}, 'Parameter'[Parameter Fields])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %])),
			'Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %] = 15
		)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			"Total_Sales", 'Currency Selector'[Total Sales]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(1001, __DS0Core, [Total_Sales], 0, 'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[Total_Sales] DESC, 'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]

DEFINE
	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]"}, 'Parameter'[Parameter Fields])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %])),
			'Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %] = 15
		)

	VAR __ValueFilterDM0 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
					'DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[COUNTRY],
					__DS0FilterTable,
					__DS0FilterTable2,
					"Profit", 'Currency Selector'[Profit],
					"Bad_Region_Flag", IGNORE('Currency Selector'[Bad Region Flag])
				)
			),
			[Bad_Region_Flag] = 1
		)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[COUNTRY],
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			__ValueFilterDM0,
			"Profit", 'Currency Selector'[Profit]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(1001, __DS0Core, [Profit], 1, 'DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[COUNTRY], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[Profit], 'DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[COUNTRY]

	VAR __DS0FilterTable =

DEFINE
	VAR __SQDS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]"}, 'Parameter'[Parameter Fields])

	VAR __SQDS0FilterTable2 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %])),
			'Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %] = 15
		)

	VAR __SQDS0Core = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
					'DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[COUNTRY],
					__SQDS0FilterTable,
					__SQDS0FilterTable2,
					"Bad_Region_Flag", IGNORE('Currency Selector'[Bad Region Flag])
				)
			),
			AND(NOT(ISBLANK('DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[COUNTRY])), [Bad_Region_Flag] = 1)
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Germany"}, 'DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[COUNTRY])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]"}, 'Parameter'[Parameter Fields])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %])),
			'Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %] = 15
		)

EVALUATE
	SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
		__SQDS0Core,
		__DS0FilterTable,
		__DS0FilterTable2,
		__DS0FilterTable3,
		"Selected_Country", IGNORE('Chart''s axis'[Selected Country])
	)

				)
			),

DEFINE
	VAR __SQDS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]"}, 'Parameter'[Parameter Fields])

	VAR __SQDS0FilterTable2 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %])),
			'Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %] = 15
		)

	VAR __SQDS0Core = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(
				SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
					'DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[COUNTRY],
					__SQDS0FilterTable,
					__SQDS0FilterTable2,
					"Bad_Region_Flag", IGNORE('Currency Selector'[Bad Region Flag])
				)
			),
			AND(NOT(ISBLANK('DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[COUNTRY])), [Bad_Region_Flag] = 1)
		)

	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Germany"}, 'DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[COUNTRY])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]"}, 'Parameter'[Parameter Fields])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %])),
			'Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %] = 15
		)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			'DIM_DATE'[MONTH],
			'DIM_DATE'[MONTH_NUMBER],
			__SQDS0Core,
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			__DS0FilterTable3,
			"Total_Sales", 'Currency Selector'[Total Sales]
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(1001, __DS0Core, [Total_Sales], 0, 'DIM_DATE'[MONTH_NUMBER], 1, 'DIM_DATE'[MONTH], 1)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[Total_Sales] DESC, 'DIM_DATE'[MONTH_NUMBER], 'DIM_DATE'[MONTH]

DEFINE

EVALUATE

ORDER BY

	VAR __DS0FilterTable = 
		TREATAS({"Germany"}, 'DIM_GEOGRAPHY'[COUNTRY])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable2 = 
		TREATAS({"'DIM_PRODUCT'[CATEGORY]"}, 'Parameter'[Parameter Fields])

	VAR __DS0FilterTable3 = 
		FILTER(
			KEEPFILTERS(VALUES('Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %])),
			'Discount Reduction %'[Discount Reduction %] = 15
		)

	VAR __DS0Core = 
		SUMMARIZECOLUMNS(
			ROLLUPADDISSUBTOTAL(
				ROLLUPGROUP('FACT_SALES'[TRANSACTION_ID], 'DIM_PRODUCT'[PRODUCT_NAME], 'FACT_SALES'[STATUS]), "IsGrandTotalRowTotal"
			),
			__SQDS0Core,
			__DS0FilterTable,
			__DS0FilterTable2,
			__DS0FilterTable3,
			"SumSALES_AMOUNT", CALCULATE(SUM('FACT_SALES'[SALES_AMOUNT])),
			"SumDISCOUNT_AMOUNT", CALCULATE(SUM('FACT_SALES'[DISCOUNT_AMOUNT])),
			"SumElapsed_Days", CALCULATE(SUM('FACT_SALES'[Elapsed Days]))
		)

	VAR __DS0PrimaryWindowed = 
		TOPN(
			502,
			__DS0Core,
			[IsGrandTotalRowTotal],
			0,
			'FACT_SALES'[TRANSACTION_ID],
			1,
			'DIM_PRODUCT'[PRODUCT_NAME],
			1,
			'FACT_SALES'[STATUS],
			1
		)

EVALUATE
	__DS0PrimaryWindowed

ORDER BY
	[IsGrandTotalRowTotal] DESC,
	'FACT_SALES'[TRANSACTION_ID],
	'DIM_PRODUCT'[PRODUCT_NAME],
	'FACT_SALES'[STATUS]
